description: A container for serial processing of nodes

parameterGroups.label: Switch Control
parameterGroups.rationale: Single parameter selecting which of 8 soft-bypassed signal paths is active. Routes to control.xfader Value parameter.

properties.note: Controls the UI layout orientation of the container.

gaps.question: softbypass_switch8 has 8 soft_bypass children and Switch max=7 vs softbypass_switch2's 2 children and max=1. Is the internal logic identical except for the additional switch targets? Is 8 the practical maximum for this pattern?
gaps.context: If identical in structure, the doc can reference the base variant and note only the switch target count difference. Being the largest variant, worth noting if there are practical limits.

notes: Variant of softbypass_switchN with N=8 (maximum). Switch parameter max=7 (values 0-7). Eight container.soft_bypass children. Structure otherwise identical to base variant. This is the largest softbypass_switch variant.
